category_sources: Official mpop documentation compares mpop to mail retrieval utilities and describes POP3/mail delivery behavior.
display_name_sources: Official mpop documentation uses the name mpop.
docs_sources: Official documentation page links the mpop manual in HTML and PDF plus example configuration.
repo_sources: Official mpop download page states source code is hosted on git.marlam.de and gives git clone https://git.marlam.de/git/mpop.git.
tags_sources: Official documentation page describes POP3 retrieval, mbox/maildir delivery, and comparison to fetchmail.
